steps.title: Break down the cost structure
steps.content: The rental breaks into two parts: $850 for the first 2 hours (a fixed amount) and $30 per additional hour for each hour beyond those first 2 hours. With $t$ total hours and $t > 2$, the additional hours are $(t-2)$.

steps.title: Write the total cost equation
steps.content:
The total cost equals the fixed part plus the variable part:
$$850 + 30(t-2)$$
Since the total is $1,030:
$$850 + 30(t-2) = 1,030$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
